Amazon A+ Content Guide

Review each module below, swipe through brand examples for inspiration, then fill in your answers. Hit "Generate my brief" when you're done.

⭐ Premium A+ vs ✓ Your Plan — Basic A+
About the example images in this guide
The brand examples shown throughout this guide are all Premium A+ Content — the full-width, edge-to-edge style where modules appear large and seamlessly connected with no gaps between sections.

You currently have Basic A+ Content, which uses slightly smaller modules with a small gap between each section. The content, messaging, and strategy are exactly the same — only the dimensions and layout differ.
✓ Your Plan
Basic A+ Content
🖥 Web 970 × 600 px Small gaps between modules
⭐ Examples shown below
Premium A+ Content
🖥 Web 1464 × 600 px Full-width, seamlessly connected
🔓 How to unlock Premium A+: Submit at least 15 A+ modules within a 12-month period and upload a Brand Story to your storefront. Premium access is granted by Amazon after a review period following those requirements.
